violations.text: The dumpster enclosure was observed to have excess cardboard, debris and old carriages. A storage area and enclosure for refuse, recyclables, or returnables shall be maintained free of unnecessary items and debris. Dumpster enclosure/area is to be maintained clean. clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The coving to the floor/wall junctures in the restrooms were observed to be missing. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2026

The non-food-contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of residue and/or debris... - The retail milk cooler shelving and base observed with milk residue - The frozen novelties chest cooler observed with an excessive ice build-up - The bases of the frozen foods reach-in coolers were observed with ice build-up Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

The coving to the floor/wall junctures in the restrooms were observed to be missing. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Coving is to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Per PIC service order has been placed. Door needs to be repaired immediately. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2023
